4.2.2 V21 Scores 

CMS developed the HCC model called version 21 (V21) in 2012. CMS includes the V21 model scores for the 2019 
payment year only (no other year of HCC data that CCW delivers). In the 2019 risk score data files, CMS used this 
model for PACE enrollees. Compared to earlier HCC model versions, this model incorporated additional HCC 
conditions, different disease interactions, and different
